title: TATAY Floor Cloth Set 50 x 70 cm Fleece, 3 Count, White, Cotton/Viscose/Polyester Blend, Heavy Weight, Machine Wash
features: Practical – The floor cloths are suitable for cleaning and drying of all smooth floors. Whether in the kitchen, living room, hallway or in the bathroom, these receptacles are absorbent and abrasion-resistant.
Durable, double-sided hemmed 100 % polyester 167 dtex white and fixed edge on the long sides.
Material – raw white fibre fleece from regenerated raw materials / approx. 55% Cotton/Viscose, Approx. 45 % polyester/other synthetic fibres, +/- 10 %
Dimensions: the floor cloths have a size of 50 x 70 cm.
Box contents: 3 x floor cleaning cloths fleece.
description: Set of 3 floor cloths fibre fleece. Raw white fibre fleece made from regenerated raw materials Approx. 55% cotton/viscose, approx. 45 % polyester / other synthetic fibres, +/- 10 % Additional sewn-on fleece with hydrophilic properties made from 100 % polypropylene Sewing threads white made from 100% polyester 167 tex Decorative coloured effect threads made from 100% polyester 167 tex (3 on each left and right) Fixed edge on the long sides Hemmed on both sides, 100% polyester, 167 tex white Dimensions: 50 x 70 cm Water absorbency: DIN 53 923 more than 400 % Abrasion resistance: DIN EN ISO 12947-2 15000 tours, 9 kPa, MD 100 Box contents: 3 x floor cloth.
